creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: sunpoet
Date: Sun Apr  6 05:47:31 2014
New Revision: 350304
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/350304
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r350304/

Log:
  - Add LICENSE
  - Pass maintainership to submitter
  - While I'm here, sort *_DEPENDS
  
  PR:		188102
  Submitted by:	Muhammad Moinur Rahman <5u623l20@gmail.com>

Modified:
  head/www/p5-WebService-MusicBrainz/Makefile

Modified: head/www/p5-WebService-MusicBrainz/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/www/p5-WebService-MusicBrainz/Makefile	Sun Apr  6 05:47:27 2014	(r350303)
+++ head/www/p5-WebService-MusicBrainz/Makefile	Sun Apr  6 05:47:31 2014	(r350304)
@@ -7,13 +7,16 @@ CATEGORIES=	www perl5
 MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
 
-MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
+MAINTAINER=	5u623l20@gmail.com
 COMMENT=	Perl interface to MusicBrainz
 
+LICENSE=	ART10 GPLv1
+LICENSE_COMB=	dual
+
 BUILD_DEPENDS=	p5-Class-Accessor>=0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/p5-Class-Accessor \
-		p5-libwww>=0:${PORTSDIR}/www/p5-libwww \
 		p5-URI>=0:${PORTSDIR}/net/p5-URI \
-		p5-XML-LibXML>=0:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/p5-XML-LibXML
+		p5-XML-LibXML>=0:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/p5-XML-LibXML \
+		p5-libwww>=0:${PORTSDIR}/www/p5-libwww
 RUN_DEPENDS:=	${BUILD_DEPENDS}
 
 USES=		perl5
